features.name: conflicting_default_nettype_directives
features.description: Code should include multiple `default_nettype` directives with conflicting values (none and wire) where a later directive incorrectly overrides an earlier one for module code

features.name: undeclared_wire_in_procedural_assignment
features.description: Code should include an undeclared wire used in procedural assignment within a module that has conflicting default_nettype directives
